summary: Logo increased to h-[100px] verified across desktop (1365), tablet (768), and mobile (390) viewports. Logo renders at exactly 100px height with aspect ratio maintained (natural 756x302 -> rendered 250.33x100). No horizontal overflow on any viewport. Logo click navigates to #hero (URL updates), and department switcher (VFX/Digital) correctly swaps logo image src. Aspect ratio math confirmed: expected 250.33 = actual 250.33.
passed: Header logo displays at exactly 100px height on desktop/tablet/mobile
VFX + Digital logo images load and display
Aspect ratio maintained via w-auto (250.33 x 100, ratio matches natural 756:302)
No horizontal overflow at 1365 / 768 / 390 viewports (logo right edge = 274px, well within 390 mobile viewport)
Department switcher toggles logo image between VFX and Digital
No JS console errors observed during interactions
observations: On tablet 768px, the centered desktop department switcher pill sits very close to the logo (logo ends at x=274, switcher starts near x=268) — visually crowded but not overlapping/breaking. Consider hiding desktop switcher below a slightly higher breakpoint if desired.
Mobile shows the md:hidden secondary switcher below the logo row as intended; layout intact.
